senses.gloss: leek (specifically a cultivar of Allium ampeloprasum called Allium kurrat)

etymology.text: Borrowed from Aramaic כרתא / ܟܪܬܐ (karrāṯā), from Akkadian 𒂵𒆜𒊬 (GA.KASKAL^(SAR), GA.RAŠ^(SAR) /⁠karašu⁠/), from Sumerian 𒂵𒆜𒊬 (GA.KASKAL^(SAR), GA.RAŠ^(SAR) /⁠garaš⁠/). Also Hebrew כְּרֵשָׁה (kərēšā́).
